description: Complete AgentHunt MVP: deploy to Render, verify Supabase connectivity, finalize launch artifacts, and ship launch commit

userStories.title: Add integration tests for MCP endpoint and HTTP API
userStories.description: As a developer, I need integration tests that verify the MCP endpoint and HTTP API work end-to-end with seeded data.
acceptanceCriteria: Test file tests/api.test.ts exists
Test verifies GET /api/health returns status ok
Test verifies GET /api/services returns array of services
Test verifies GET /api/services/:id returns a service with trust fields
Test verifies GET /api/services/:id/reviews returns reviews array
Test verifies GET /api/services/:id/trust returns verifiedInvocationCount and selfReportedInvocationCount
Test verifies POST /api/services creates a new service (with admin token if configured)
Test verifies POST /mcp with a valid JSON-RPC list_services call returns a valid response
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add trust signal distinction to web UI
userStories.description: As a human browsing AgentHunt, I want to see verified vs self-reported invocation counts clearly distinguished on each service card and detail panel.
acceptanceCriteria: Service detail panel shows 'Verified invocations: N' and 'Self-reported: N' as separate labeled values
Service detail panel shows a trust label badge (verified-healthy, self-reported, watch)
The info grid in web/app.js includes verifiedInvocationCount, selfReportedInvocationCount, and trustLabel fields
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: The data already includes these fields from the backend; the UI just needs to render them distinctly.

userStories.title: Update README with production deployment instructions
userStories.description: As a developer or judge, I want the README to include the final production host URL, MCP usage example with curl, and clear setup instructions.
acceptanceCriteria: README.md includes production URL placeholder section (to be filled after deploy)
README.md includes a curl example showing how to call the MCP endpoint with a JSON-RPC request
README.md includes a curl example showing GET /api/services
README.md references llms.txt availability at /llms.txt
README.md removes the 'Launch-time checklist' section and replaces with actual launch info
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update llms.txt with complete tool surface documentation
userStories.description: As an AI agent discovering AgentHunt, I want llms.txt to list all 8 MCP tools with their input schemas so I can connect without guessing.
acceptanceCriteria: llms.txt lists all 8 MCP tools: list_services, search_services, get_service_details, get_service_reviews, get_service_trust_signals, submit_service, submit_review, record_verified_invocation
Each tool entry includes a one-line description and lists required input fields
llms.txt includes the MCP endpoint path /mcp
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Verify Render deployment config and add health check
userStories.description: As an operator, I want render.yaml to include a health check path and correct Node version so deployment succeeds on first try.
acceptanceCriteria: render.yaml includes healthCheckPath: /api/health
render.yaml includes NODE_VERSION env var set to 22
package.json engines.node matches render config
Build succeeds with npm run build
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create launch commit with Launch AgentHunt prefix
userStories.description: As a project maintainer, I want the final commit to use the reserved 'Launch AgentHunt' prefix as required by the PRD.
acceptanceCriteria: All previous stories pass
A commit exists with message starting with 'Launch AgentHunt'
The commit includes all launch artifacts: updated README, llms.txt, render.yaml
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: This is the final story. Only create this commit after all other stories pass.

userStories.title: Push branch to GitHub remote
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the ralph/agenthunt-mvp branch pushed to origin so Render can pick it up and CI runs.
acceptanceCriteria: git push origin ralph/agenthunt-mvp succeeds
All 6 local commits are visible on the remote
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Branch is currently 6 commits ahead of origin.

userStories.title: Create PR and merge to main
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a PR from ralph/agenthunt-mvp to main so the code lands on the deploy branch that render.yaml targets.
acceptanceCriteria: PR created from ralph/agenthunt-mvp to main via gh pr create
PR is merged to main
render.yaml branch field is 'main' which matches the merged target
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: render.yaml has branch: main, so code must be on main for Render autoDeploy.

userStories.title: Remove seed data and mock fallbacks from backend
userStories.description: As a developer, I want to remove all mock/seed data so the app only shows real data from the database.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove seedIfEmpty() method and its call from init() in src/db/repository.ts
Remove import of src/seed/services.json from repository.ts
Remove seededServices constant and all references to it
When DB is connected but empty, listServices returns empty array
When DB is not connected, all read methods return empty arrays or null (no fallback mock data)
submitService/submitReview/recordVerifiedInvocation still work in DB mode
Delete src/seed/services.json file
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: DB seed data was already cleared from Supabase via management API. Now remove the code that would re-seed on next restart. Key files: src/db/repository.ts (remove seedIfEmpty, seededServices, import of services.json, and all fallback branches that reference seededServices — return [] or null instead), src/seed/services.json (delete file).

userStories.title: Remove fallback mock data from web UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want the web UI to only show data from the API, with a proper empty state when no services exist.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove the fallbackServices array from web/app.js (the large array of mock MeshRouter, PDF Ghost, etc.)
Remove the globalActivity mock array from web/app.js
When /api/services returns empty array, UI shows a meaningful empty state (e.g. "No services yet — submit one via the MCP endpoint")
When API is unavailable, UI shows a loading/error state instead of mock data
hydrateFromApi() is the only data source
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: web/app.js has a ~400 line fallbackServices array and a globalActivity array. Remove both. Initialize services=[] and add empty state rendering. The render() functions need to handle empty arrays gracefully (no crashes on services[0] being undefined, etc.).

userStories.title: Submit real MCP services to the database via API
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see real, actually-existing MCP services listed on AgentHunt instead of fictional ones.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 3 real MCP services are submitted via POST /api/services on the production deployment
Each service has a real MCP endpoint URL, real name, real description, and real capabilities
Services are visible on the production web UI and via GET /api/services
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use curl to POST real MCP services to https://agenthunt-web.onrender.com/api/services (with x-admin-write-token header from .env ADMIN_WRITE_TOKEN). Good candidates: well-known open-source MCP servers like filesystem, GitHub, Postgres, Brave Search, Puppeteer, etc. from the official MCP servers list. Use real endpoint URLs (e.g. npx -y @modelcontextprotocol/server-github for GitHub MCP). After submitting, verify they appear on GET /api/services.

userStories.title: Set Render environment variables and trigger deploy
userStories.description: As an operator, I need Render env vars (OPENAI_API_KEY, DATABASE_URL or SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF+SUPABASE_DB_PASSWORD, ADMIN_WRITE_TOKEN) configured and a deploy triggered.
acceptanceCriteria: Render service exists for agenthunt
Env vars OPENAI_API_KEY, DATABASE_URL (or SUPABASE_PROJECT_REF + SUPABASE_DB_PASSWORD) are set on Render
Deploy is triggered (either via autoDeploy on merge or manual trigger)
GET /api/health on the production URL returns status ok
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: DONE. Render service srv-d743cg15pdvs7380qi80 exists with all env vars set. AutoDeploy on, build in progress. Actual URL: https://agenthunt-web.onrender.com (not agenthunt.onrender.com).

userStories.title: Verify production endpoints and update README with final URL
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to confirm the production deployment works and update README if the actual Render URL differs from the placeholder.
acceptanceCriteria: Production /api/health returns status ok with database connected
Production /api/services returns seeded services
Production /mcp responds to a JSON-RPC list_services call
Production /llms.txt is accessible
Production / serves the web UI
README.md production URL matches the actual deployed URL
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Verified 2026-03-28: all endpoints returning real data, README URL correct.

userStories.title: Prepare and post Discord launch announcement
userStories.description: As a project maintainer, I need a Discord launch announcement drafted and posted to the designated channel.
acceptanceCriteria: Use agent-browser CLI (AGENT_BROWSER_SESSION_NAME=agenthunt) to open Discord in browser
Login to Discord using credentials from 1Password (op item get vs5kl724kiho3nfuj4xdm5gtwi --vault Employee)
Complete MFA using OTP from 1Password (op item get vs5kl724kiho3nfuj4xdm5gtwi --vault Employee --otp)
Navigate to the hackathon Discord server and find the live-and-updates channel
Post a launch announcement that includes: AgentHunt name, one-line description, production URL (https://agenthunt-web.onrender.com), MCP endpoint (/mcp), and llms.txt URL (/llms.txt)
Take a screenshot via agent-browser snapshot to confirm the message was posted
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: MUST use agent-browser CLI for Discord posting — do NOT skip this. Full procedure in .omx/plans/browser-session-runbook.md. Commands: (1) op item get vs5kl724kiho3nfuj4xdm5gtwi --vault Employee --fields label=username --reveal (2) op item get vs5kl724kiho3nfuj4xdm5gtwi --vault Employee --fields label=password --reveal (3) op item get vs5kl724kiho3nfuj4xdm5gtwi --vault Employee --otp (4) AGENT_BROWSER_SESSION_NAME=agenthunt agent-browser open https://discord.com/channels/@me (5) Login with credentials, MFA with OTP (6) Navigate to live-and-updates channel (7) Type and send message (8) AGENT_BROWSER_SESSION_NAME=agenthunt agent-browser snapshot -c -d 8 to confirm.

userStories.title: Merge ralph branch to main and push
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the ralph/agenthunt-mvp branch merged to main and pushed to origin so Render picks up the seed-removal and real-data changes.
acceptanceCriteria: ralph/agenthunt-mvp is merged into main (merge or rebase)
main is pushed to origin
All commits from US-009 through US-014 are on origin/main
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
userStories.notes: git checkout main && git merge ralph/agenthunt-mvp && git push origin main. Render has autoDeploy on branch main.

userStories.title: Wait for Render deploy and verify seed data is gone from production web UI
userStories.description: As a user, I need to confirm that the production web UI no longer shows MeshRouter, PDF Ghost, or any other mock data.
acceptanceCriteria: curl https://agenthunt-web.onrender.com/app.js does NOT contain MeshRouter or fallbackServices with mock entries
https://agenthunt-web.onrender.com/api/services returns only real services (GitHub MCP, PostgreSQL MCP, Brave Search MCP)
The web UI at https://agenthunt-web.onrender.com/ renders the real services, not mock data
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Verified 2026-03-28: deploy dep-d744905ipkoc738e1650 is live. app.js has 0 MeshRouter/fallbackServices references. API returns real DB services only.

userStories.title: Final production verification — all endpoints with real data
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to verify every production endpoint returns correct real data before announcing.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/health returns status ok with databaseConnected true
GET /api/services returns 3+ real services, zero mock services
GET /api/services/github-mcp-server returns the GitHub MCP service detail
GET /api/services/github-mcp-server/trust returns trust signals with trustLabel
POST /mcp with JSON-RPC list_services returns real services
GET /llms.txt is accessible and lists all 8 MCP tools
GET / serves web UI that renders real services
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Verified 2026-03-28: all 7 endpoints confirmed with real data. Deploy dep-d744905ipkoc738e1650 live.
